name: Low-Fat Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350°F. Grease a cookie sheet with margarine.
In a large bowl, cream together the oil and sugars until well combined.
Add the egg white, vanilla, and water; mix well.
Gradually add the oats, flours, salt, baking soda, and cinnamon, stirring only until the ingredients are just blended.
Do not overmix, as this will cause the texture of the oats to break down.
Drop spoonfuls of batter onto the prepared cookie sheet.
Bake for 10-15 minutes.
Makes approximately 3 dozen cookies.
